tests.description: Regression for the resumeRaceWinner seedCost bug: when the winner branch interrupts and then resumes, the parent's cost-tracking baseline has already been mutated by loser-branch propagation at interrupt time. The winner's final delta must therefore be computed against an immutable per-branch seed (seedCost), not the parent's current localCost — otherwise losers get double-subtracted and the total under-counts. This test asserts that after resume, the parent sees losers' completed-call spend ON TOP of the winner's full spend.
